name: tokengochi-overlay
description: Canvas 2D overlay renderer + behavior AI for the pet window. Vanilla TypeScript, no framework (see docs/decisions/0003-canvas-sprite-rendering.md).

scripts.build: esbuild src/main.ts --bundle --format=esm --outfile=../dashboard/static/overlay/overlay.js && cp index.html ../dashboard/static/overlay/index.html && mkdir -p ../dashboard/static/overlay/sprites ../dashboard/static/overlay/sprites/items && cp ../assets/sprites/hatchling/*.png ../assets/sprites/hatchling/*.json ../assets/sprites/effects/*.png ../assets/sprites/effects/*.json ../dashboard/static/overlay/sprites/ && cp ../assets/sprites/items/*.png ../dashboard/static/overlay/sprites/items/
